response: Data collection begins with identifying the sources of data to ensure accuracy and relevance. Data analysis requires careful handling of data to reveal meaningful patterns. Data gathering involves recording data in a structured format for easy retrieval. Data interpretation depends on the quality of data and its consistency. Data validation ensures that data remains reliable throughout the study. Data entry must maintain the integrity of data to prevent errors. Data storage requires secure methods to protect the confidentiality of data. Data sharing involves transmitting data while preserving its original form.
